title: 101 DVD vs 111 DVD vs 111 Blu Ray
display_title: 101 DVD vs 111 DVD vs 111 Blu Ray
wikitext:
[]: 1.01 DVD vs 1.11 DVD vs 1.11 Blu-Ray             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:04 pm The 1.11 editions have been remastered, but other than that, do they have anything new added to them? I know the blu-ray is 720P/1080P. Did 1.11 have anything removed from the 1.01 release? Thanks!

[]: Re: 1.01 DVD vs 1.11 DVD vs 1.11 Blu-Ray             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:10 pm Did 1.11 have anything removed from the 1.01 release?

[]:             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:32 pm Thanks! Any difference in bonus features?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:33 pm It's unfinished, Reichu needs to look into the other screenshots, but that's the list: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evangelion_1.01_vs._Evangelion_1.11

[]:             Quote Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:25 pm Thanks a lot! Looks like I'll be getting the Blu-ray release.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 4:42 pm i'll be getting the standard definition copy of 1.11 for certain reasons

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:53 pm i only saw bluray rip on the net but the colour is diferent from the dvd release, the dvd are more satureted and bright. i liked the blu ray colours better.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jan 03, 2010 5:05 pm speaking of BDs, funi release has pig disgusting cover [URL=http://img229.imageshack.us/i/1262554737311.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 03, 2010 5:16 pm For what it's worth, those CGI Eva-01 images used in the Funimation promotional/poster/DVD cover images for 1.0 IS apparently by one of the Japanese Kara staff. But yeah, they could have picked a better image despite that.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Jan 03, 2010 5:32 pm At least they left the original cover.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Jan 03, 2010 8:32 pm Why are they using an up skirt shot of Unit-01???

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Jan 04, 2010 8:45 am Fazmotron wrote: Why are they using an up skirt shot of Unit-01???

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Jan 04, 2010 9:05 am The Australian release better have a better cover, otherwise I will be sad.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 04, 2010 11:02 am GasmaskAvenger wrote: i'll be getting the standard definition copy of 1.11 for certain reasons

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jan 05, 2010 3:24 am The Eva Monkey wrote: GasmaskAvenger wrote: i'll be getting the standard definition copy of 1.11 for certain reasons

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Jan 05, 2010 1:45 pm funi release has pig disgusting cover

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:01 pm Xard wrote: speaking of BDs, funi release has pig disgusting cover [URL=http://img229.imageshack.us/i/1262554737311.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 09, 2010 11:25 pm I would go for something...I dunno...more haunting or awe-inspiring the covers for both the 1.01 & 1.11 US releases aren't exactly the direction I would go to make buyers have the need to buy the DVDs

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 09, 2010 11:39 pm I like FUNi's cover. It also reminded of a CGI Unit-01 commercial I saw on youtube that I can't find at all at the moment. I do like the original Japanese cover a lot more mostly because I like Rei and I'm a Shinji/Rei shipper.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Sun Jan 10, 2010 2:17 am I dont know..... Me personally, i find the funimation cover to be just passable. Its nice to know that its official art done by Khara and not just some fan art thing that Funi used. Still i dont like it that much. Would have much preferred some original 2D art for the cover done by Khara.
